item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Cooperative Housing Trust Authority
item.description:
👀 Cooperative Housing Trust Authority

Federal cooperative housing trust authority 119th Congress: regulatory clarity for member-owned housing trusts · LIHTC-eligibility expansion · cooperative-class member down-payment-pool provisions. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 3 + Affordable Housing + Workforce Housing + Section 8 Reform + Mortgage Assumability. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
